Author: Zune
Name: Master Of Puppets
Description:
An FFXIV plugin that lets you create and send custom actions, similar to in-game macros, either locally or via chat-based broadcasting.
Actions can be broadcast to multiple clients locally or through in-game chat channels such as Party, Linkshell, and Cross-World Linkshell.
Use it to trigger custom actions like emotes, minions, mounts, glamour changes, and more.
